description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has three jobs: tests, pre-commit, and check-package. The tests job runs on multiple Python versions, checks out the code, installs dependencies, runs tests with coverage, and uploads coverage to Codecov. The pre-commit job runs pre-commit hooks. The check-package job builds and inspects the package.
